Placer County Sheriff revealed limited details about the incident on a social media post on X.

There has been a critical incident at the Olympic Village Inn at Palisades, according to the Placer County Sheriff's office.

Placer County Sheriff revealed limited details about the incident on a social media post on X.

The sheriff's office released a statement on social media just after 11 a.m. on Friday, Jan. 26 stating the incident is stable but there's a large police presence as a result.

"There was a critical incident that occurred at Olympic Village Inn at Palisades. State Parks was the primary agency for the incident. The incident is stable, but there is still a large police presence. Please stay clear of the area," the Sheriff's post read.



The Sheriff’s Office has provided an update saying that there was a shooting involving California State Park Officers,2News Nevadareported.

The Olympic Village Inn near the popular Tahoe ski resort is described as a vacation ownership hotel and resort nestled in the mountains of Olympic Valley near Lake Tahoe.
